name: Syslog Component
description: The `syslog` component can be used to send ESPHome logs to a [syslog server](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Syslog). It requires both a [UDP component](https://esphome.io/components/udp/) and a [Time component](https://esphome.io/components/time/) to be configured.

config_entries.label: Level
config_entries.description: The highest log level to send to the syslog server. Defaults to `DEBUG`.

config_entries.label: Time ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the time client to use for time-stamping logs. May be omitted if only one time client is configured.

config_entries.label: UDP ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the UDP client to use for sending logs. May be omitted if only one UDP client is configured.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Facility
config_entries.description: The syslog facility to use. Defaults to `16` (corresponding to `local0`  ).

config_entries.label: Port
config_entries.description: The port to send logs to. Defaults to `514`.
